title: Start Here
description: How to customize your new Pirate Social site

blocks.heading: How To Set Up Your Site
blocks.subheading: Use this sample page as a guide, then replace it with your own content.

blocks.body:
## 1) Edit this page

Open **/admin** and go to **Pages -> Start Here**.

You can add, remove, and reorder blocks to build custom pages.

## 2) Publish your first post

Go to **Posts** in the CMS and create a new post with a title, publish date, and content.

## 3) Configure your profile

Open **Settings** to set your site title, description, avatar, and social options.

## 4) Remove sample content

When you're ready, delete this page and the sample post from the CMS.
